description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the base/archlinux Docker image. In the global before_script install the D language compiler and package manager with `pacman -Syy dmd dub --needed --noconfirm`, create a directory `~/.fixer`, and write the secret `$FIXER_API_ACCESS_KEY` to `~/.fixer/api-access-key.txt`. Define a single stage `test` and a job `unit_tests` in that stage that runs `dub test`. No caches, artifacts, or special rules are defined.
